mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE ( ID, BUSINESS_DATA_ID, BUSINESS_ID, PROC_INST_ID, PROC_DEF_ID, CURRENT_NODE_NAME, APPROVER_NAMES, INSTANCE_STATUS, START_TIME, END_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessDataId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procDefId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentNodeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverNames,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instanceStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
